name: BMX Gravel
short_description: An action-adventure BMX game with light-hearted humour and arcade controls. Encounter tricks, hoops, ramps, hazards, star ratings and more that escalate as you progress and get ready for the ride of your life!
detailed_description:
Ready to tear up gravel, get big air and pump out the tricks BMX-style?

Easy to learn, but more difficult to master. Hone your skills and chalk up bigger and better stats the harder and faster you go, all the while discovering new things along the way.

Play through 5 different environment stages made up of 20+ levels of gravelly fun with plenty of cool BMX moves, tricks, bonuses and hazards that change as you progress. Collect gold, silver and bronze stars based on your performance in each level.

Each level has something unique to offer and there are several easter eggs sprinkled throughout the game.​

So put your foot to the pedal and see what great feats of daring you can achieve in your quest towards the ultimate BMX Gravel Master title!
